### The "Intelligent Code Enhancer" - Complexity Score: 9.2/5

441 lines of "enhancement" logic when most enhancements are 10-line operations. It has 35 thinking blocks - more meta-analysis than actual analysis. Violates complexity rules by **84%**.

### The "ADHD Context Switch" - Complexity Score: 8.5/5

398 lines to "simplify" context switching. Your brain will spend more energy parsing this command than actually switching contexts. Violates rules by **70%**.

### The "Adaptive Complexity Router" - Complexity Score: 7.3/5

498 lines of "intelligent routing" that's more complex than most problems it's trying to solve. It's like hiring a consultant to tell you how to hire consultants.
